assertions.description: U3 is correctly identified as an LDO with topology='LDO', input_rail='+5V', output_rail='VCC'. Decoupling analysis correctly identifies bypass caps on both rails.

U2 (LMV358, dual op-amp) is classified as generic 'ic'. The signal_analysis.amplifiers list is empty. HB100 is a Doppler sensor preamp circuit with two op-amp gain stages built around U2 units 1 and 2. The analyzer should detect the inverting/non-inverting topology of each LMV358 unit.
